title: Schumer calls on Xi to support Israel as China says relation with US ‘will determine the future of humanity’
description: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer led a bipartisan delegation of senators to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping in a rare meeting on Monday.
snippet: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer told Chinese President Xi Jinping in a rare meeting Monday that he was "very disappointed" that China failed to condemn the...
